name: SwanLab
description: Open-source ML experiment tracking tool (Chinese W&B alternative) with hyperparameters, curves and remote dashboards.

seo.title: SwanLab — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: SwanLab: Open-source ML experiment tracking tool (Chinese W&B alternative) with hyperparameters, curves and remote dashboards.

when_to_use: ML experiment tracking with hyperparameter logging
Training curve visualization for model comparison
Open-source alternative to W&B for Chinese ML teams
Remote dashboard sharing for distributed training runs

pros: Open-source W&B alternative with core features
cons: Smaller global community than W&B or MLflow
Docs stronger in Chinese than English
review.verdict: Credible open W&B alternative for budget-conscious ML teams, especially in APAC; trails W&B in polish.
review.best_for: ML teams wanting self-hosted experiment tracking without W&B pricing.
review.not_for: Teams needing the richest integrations and mature MLOps ecosystem.
